fields.title: Terms & Conditions
fields.content:
⚠️ These Terms & Conditions constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User") and Charge Ghar ("Company"). By creating an account or using our services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these terms.

## 1. Eligibility & User Account
- Must be at least 18 years of age to register.
- Required to complete KYC verification with accurate identity documents before renting.
- Solely responsible for maintaining confidentiality of account credentials.
- All registration and KYC information must be accurate, complete, and up to date.
- Only one active account allowed. Multiple accounts strictly prohibited.
- Responsible for all activities under your account.
- Charge Ghar reserves the right to verify identity and suspend suspicious accounts.

## 2. Rental Rules & Usage
- Power banks must be rented through the official app by scanning the station QR code.
- Each user may rent only one power bank at a time.
- Rental period begins when the power bank is released and ends upon successful return.
- Power banks must only be used to charge personal electronic devices.
- Must not tamper with, modify, or disassemble the power bank or any station.
- Must not be used for commercial resale or any unlawful purpose.
- Responsible for safe custody of the power bank during the rental period.

## 3. Payments, Fees & Billing
- Must maintain minimum wallet balance or valid payment method before renting.
- Rental fees calculated based on duration of use.
- All transactions are final. Refunds only for verified Charge Ghar technical errors.
- Overdue charges apply if power bank is not returned within maximum rental period.
- Security deposit may be required; refunded upon successful return.
- Charge Ghar may charge your payment method for outstanding fees, penalties, or unreturned power bank costs.
- Prices in Nepalese Rupees (NPR); may be subject to applicable taxes.

## 4. Liability, Damages & Loss
- Users fully responsible for the power bank during the entire rental period.
- Damage results in a penalty fee equivalent to replacement cost.
- Failure to return within maximum period results in "Lost" status and full penalty charge.
- Charge Ghar not liable for damage to your personal devices.
- Not responsible for losses from stolen or lost power banks after leaving the station.
- Maximum liability shall not exceed the total amount paid in the relevant rental transaction.

## 5. App Permissions
- 📍 Location: Show nearby charging stations and track active rental locations.
- 🔔 Notifications: Send rental status updates, return reminders, and service alerts.
- 📷 Camera: Scan QR codes on stations to initiate a power bank rental.

## 6. Account Deletion
🗑️ Delete account via Settings → Account → Delete Account in the app. Outstanding rentals or balances must be resolved first. Data removed from active systems within 30 days.

## 7. Prohibited Conduct
- Providing false identity or impersonating another person.
- Hacking, reverse engineering, or disrupting Charge Ghar systems.
- Using the service for illegal activity under Nepalese law.
- Intentionally damaging or stealing Charge Ghar equipment.
- Creating fake accounts or using bots to exploit the platform.
- Reselling rented power banks or using them for commercial gain.

## 8. Account Suspension & Termination
Charge Ghar may suspend or terminate accounts for: violating Terms, failing to return power banks, fraudulent behavior, bad faith charge disputes, or failure to pay outstanding fees.

## 9. Governing Law
Governed by the laws of Nepal. Disputes resolved through direct negotiation first; unresolved disputes subject to courts of Kathmandu, Nepal.

## 10. Amendments
Charge Ghar reserves the right to update Terms at any time. Users notified of significant changes via in-app notifications. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

Legal Contact: legal@chargeghar.com

Last Updated: February 2026

fields.title: Privacy Policy
fields.content:
🛡️ We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with any third party for marketing purposes. Data is stored safely using industry-standard encryption.

## 1. Information We Collect
- Personal Information: Full name, phone number, email address, profile photo.
- KYC Data: Government-issued ID documents and photos for verification.
- Location Data: Precise GPS location (with permission) for nearby stations and active rentals.
- Usage Data: Rental history, transaction records, session durations, payment history.
- Device Information: Device model, OS version, app version, unique device identifiers.
- Camera Data: Only for QR scanning. No images captured or stored.
- Financial Information: Payment details via gateway (PCI-DSS). Raw card data never stored.

## 2. How We Use Your Information
- Create and manage accounts; verify identity via KYC.
- Process rental transactions, calculate fees, manage wallet balances.
- Show nearby charging stations using your location.
- Send push notifications for rental status, return reminders, and account alerts.
- Detect, investigate, and prevent fraud and Terms violations.
- Improve app performance and user experience.
- Comply with applicable laws and regulations in Nepal.

## 3. App Permissions
- 📍 Location: Displays nearby stations; records pickup/return locations. Only accessed while app is active or during active rental.
- 🔔 Notifications: Sends charging updates, rental reminders, and account notifications.
- 📷 Camera: Exclusively for QR code scanning. No photos or video captured or stored.

## 4. Data Storage & Security
- 🔐 Encryption: Data encrypted in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest (AES-256).
- 🏛️ Secure Servers: Access-controlled servers with regular security audits.
- 🔑 KYC Security: Identity documents stored with restricted access for verification only.
- 🕵️ Fraud Detection: Automated systems monitor for suspicious activity.

## 5. Third-Party Services
✅ We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for advertising or marketing.
- Payment Gateways: Secure transaction processing (PCI-DSS compliant). No raw card data stored.
- Analytics Tools: Anonymous, aggregated app performance data only. No PII shared.
- Cloud Infrastructure: Secure hosting providers bound by data processing agreements.

## 6. Data Retention
- Personal Data: While account is active + as required by Nepalese law.
- Transaction & Rental Records: Up to 7 years for legal/financial compliance.
- KYC Documents: As required by applicable regulations.
- Deleted Account Data: Removed from active systems within 30 days of request.

## 7. Your Rights
- Access: Request a copy of personal data held about you.
- Correction: Update or correct inaccurate info via app settings.
- Deletion: Delete via Settings → Account → Delete Account. Processed within 30 days.
- Data Portability: Request a structured export of your data.
- Object: Object to certain processing activities, subject to legal requirements.

## 8. Account Deletion
🗑️ Via Settings → Account Management → Delete Account or email privacy@chargeghar.com. Outstanding rentals/balances must be settled first. Data removed within 30 days.

## 9. Children's Privacy
Services not intended for users under 18. Knowingly collected minor data will be deleted immediately. Contact privacy@chargeghar.com if a minor has registered.

## 10. Policy Changes
Updates notified via in-app notifications. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

## 11. Privacy Contact
- Email: privacy@chargeghar.com
- Address: Charge Ghar Pvt. Ltd., Kathmandu, Nepal
- Response Time: Within 72 hours on business days

Last Updated: February 2026

fields.title: About Us - Nepal's Power Bank Revolution
fields.content:
Charge Ghar is Nepal's power bank sharing network, dedicated to keeping you connected wherever you go. Our mission is to eliminate "low battery anxiety" by providing a convenient, sustainable, and affordable mobile charging solution accessible to everyone.

## Our Mission
🎯 To empower a mobile-first world with seamless energy access, fostering a sustainable future by reducing electronic waste through shared resources.

## Our Vision
👁️ A Nepal where no one ever worries about a dead battery. From Kathmandu to every corner of the country — Charge Ghar is there.

## Sustainability
💚 Shared economy reduces the need for individual power banks. Fewer devices manufactured means less electronic waste for our planet.

## Community
🤝 We partner with cafes, malls, airports, hospitals, and businesses to ensure stations are always where you need them most.

## The Charge Ghar Advantage

### Convenience
📍 Thousands of locations across Nepal. Whether you're at a café, airport, mall, or restaurant — a Charge Ghar station is always within reach.

### Portability
🔋 Charge on the move with no strings attached. Take the power bank with you and return it to any station in our network.

### Sustainability
🌿 Our shared economy model reduces the need for individual power banks, cutting down electronic waste and carbon footprint.

### Affordability
💸 Pay only for what you use. Transparent pricing with no hidden fees, subscriptions, or lock-in contracts.

fields.title: Contact Us
fields.content:
## Get in Touch

We're here to help! Reach out to us through any of the following channels:

### Contact Information

✉️ **General Support**
support@chargeghar.com

🔒 **Privacy & Data Requests**
privacy@chargeghar.com

⚖️ **Legal & Compliance**
legal@chargeghar.com

📍 **Office Address**
Charge Ghar Pvt. Ltd., Kathmandu, Nepal 🇳🇵

### Response Times

⏱️ **Active Rental Response:** Within 2 hours
⏱️ **General Inquiry Response:** Within 24 hours

### In-App Support

For immediate assistance, use the in-app support:
Settings → Help & Support → Report an Issue

### Account Deletion

🗑️ **Via App:** Settings → Account → Delete Account
🗑️ **Via Email:** privacy@chargeghar.com

### Contact Form

To submit a support request, please include:
- Full Name (required)
- Email Address (required)
- Phone Number (optional)
- Subject (required)
- Message (required)

**Subject Options:**
1. Rental Issue
2. Billing & Payments
3. Account & KYC
4. Technical Problem
5. Privacy / Data Request
6. Account Deletion Request
7. Partnership Inquiry
8. General Feedback
9. Other

🆘 Support is available 24/7 for active rental emergencies.

fields.title: Renting Policy
fields.content:
## 1. Rental Process

**Step 1: Find a Station**
Open the app and use the live map to locate the nearest available station.

**Step 2: Scan the QR Code**
Tap "Rent", scan the QR code. Ensure sufficient wallet balance.

**Step 3: Collect Your Power Bank**
Slot opens and power bank is released. Rental timer begins immediately.

**Step 4: Charge Your Device**
Use built-in cables (USB-C, Lightning, Micro-USB). Power bank is portable.

**Step 5: Return to Any Station**
Insert into any available slot at any Charge Ghar station. LED turns 🟢 green on success. Check app for "Rental Ended" notification.

## 2. Fees & Charges

💡 Actual fee amounts are displayed in the app before confirming rental. Charges auto-deducted from Charge Ghar wallet.

- **Base Fee (First Hour):** Charged from moment power bank is released.
- **Hourly Rate:** Per hour after the first hour.
- **Daily Cap (24 hrs):** Maximum charge per 24-hour period.
- **Security Deposit:** Refundable upon successful return.
- **Overdue Fee:** Applied after maximum rental period is exceeded.
- **Lost Penalty:** Charged if not returned within specified days.

## 3. Overdue & Non-Return Policy

- Power bank considered Overdue after specified hours without return.
- Push notifications sent before overdue status is triggered.
- Overdue fees accumulate on top of regular rental fees.
- Marked as Lost if not returned within specified days.
- Lost penalty charged immediately.
- Security deposit forfeited on non-return.
- Accounts suspended until Lost penalty is paid.
- Returning after Lost marking may result in partial penalty refund at Charge Ghar's discretion.

## 4. Returning the Power Bank

- Return to any available slot at any Charge Ghar station across Nepal.
- Insert firmly until it clicks into place.
- Slot LED turns 🟢 Green to confirm successful return.
- In-app "Rental Ended" notification with final bill summary.
- If slot full or technical error, try another slot or nearby station.
- Do not leave power bank unattended without completing digital return in app.
- Security deposit refunded to wallet within 24 hours of confirmed return.

## 5. Power Bank Care

- Avoid dropping, getting wet, or exposing to extreme temperatures.
- Do not use visibly damaged power banks — report via app's Help section.
- Do not open, disassemble, or modify the power bank.
- Intentional damage results in full replacement cost charge.

## 6. Cancellation

- Rental cannot be cancelled once power bank is released from station.
- To end rental, return the power bank to any Charge Ghar station.
- Accidental rental due to technical error: contact support within 5 minutes with a screenshot.

## 7. Support & Assistance

**In-App:** Settings → Help & Support → Report an Issue
**Email:** support@chargeghar.com
**Response Time:** Within 2 hours for active rental issues

🆘 Support is available 24/7 for active rental emergencies.

Last Updated: February 2026
